strengths: 20 years of continuous software engineering experience across diverse technical stacks (infrastructure, platforms, full-stack), exceeding the 15-year minimum requirement
Demonstrated product builder: created and maintained GISCollective open-source platform for 10 years and shipped multiple commercial products in startup environments
Currently working on AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks, AI-agent tooling) at re:cinq, showing recent pivot into the target domain
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and infrastructure-focused rather than demonstrated through AI-powered products or ML systems; no shipped AI products mentioned before April 2025
Missing preferred qualification: no Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML or related field; only two Bachelor's degrees in general CS and design

Career pattern shows technical generalist (web, mobile, embedded, data infrastructure) rather than deep strategic expertise in cloud or AI—responsibilities have been execution-focused rather than strategic advisory
response.justification: Bogdan brings strong foundational engineering chops and startup exposure, meeting the minimum 15-year requirement and demonstrating product-building ability. However, the role explicitly seeks 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'—a core requirement this resume does not satisfy. His MCP and AI-agent work at re:cinq (started April 2025) suggests he is building toward this, but the resume provides no evidence of having shipped AI products, led AI strategy decisions, or advised customers on AI adoption. Without a Master's/PhD in AI and without substantive AI product lineage, he appears to be at the beginning of a pivot rather than the established principal with the strategic depth this director-level role demands.
